case_title: MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC VS. DAVID W. HOCKERSMITH

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: PETITIONER'S COUNSEL CONTESTED THE TENTATIVE RULING AND ARGUED RE: THE UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE, THE IMPROPER SERVICE AND THE LACK OF COURTESY COPIES. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT AND TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Order To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Mar-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Jonathan D. Robbins, Esq. of Morgan Stanley Smith Barney, Tel. 415.693.6215, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Petitioner's counsel contested the tentative ruling and argued re: the untimely proof of service, the improper service and the lack of courtesy copies. At the conclusion of argument and to the satisfaction of the Court, the Court vacated its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC's Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Order To Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment Thereon

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
